messages.content: 通过数字化技术实现对油井的监控和在线管理。英文
Real-time monitoring and online management of oil wells through digital technology.
构建油田关键的数字化资产。英文
Constructing critical digital assets for oilfields.
through digital technology and construct critical digital assets for oilfields.修正语法
Using digital technology to construct critical digital assets for oilfields.
VR
Virtual Reality (VR)
通过VR技术和手势交互提供沉浸式的体验。英文
Providing an immersive experience through VR technology and gesture interactions.
我们正在尝试构建一个油井的数字化实体，一方面能够接入传感器的数据反应油井的生产状况，另一方面通过3D动态效果刻画井的作业过程，形成油井的数字化资产。同时利于机器学习方法对油井生产状况预测。 英文

We are working on constructing a digital entity of an oil well that can integrate sensor data to reflect the production status of the well, provide a 3D dynamic visualization of the well's operation process, and form a digital asset of the well. This enables machine learning methods to predict the production status of the oil well.
这包系统将包含井的整个生产历史，目前的生产状态，和对未来的预测。英文
This system will include the entire production history of the well, its current production status, and predictions for the future.
包含生产的关键信息以及井的关键信息，可以利用该平台快速了解油田生产动态，帮助油藏工程师进行异常井的筛查。英文

Containing essential production and well information, this platform can provide a quick understanding of the production dynamics in the oil field and assist reservoir engineers to identify anomalous wells.
我们利用web3D技术实现了GIs信息，地质信息，井信息，场站信息的3D可视化，通过接入实时的传感器数据和视频数据优化油田的管理。英文

We have utilized web3D technology to implement 3D visualization of GIS information, geological information, well information, and field station information. By integrating real-time sensor and video data, we can optimize oil field management.
Oilfield management is divided into three different scenarios based on different scales the sence. 中文
油田管理基于规模的不同情景，可以分为三种不同的场景。
Oilfield management is divided into three different scenarios based on different scales of the sence.
Oilfield management can be divided into three different scenarios based on the different scales of the field.
